overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city district in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a character through neon-lit streets beneath elevated highways, across reflective intersections, and past futuristic architecture with vibrant teal, pink, and yellow neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the yellow elevated highway structure, passing various neon advertisements on the right

entered.detail: large yellow elevated highway structure with neon underlighting running parallel to the sidewalk
large vertical billboard displaying a woman's face with red and pink neon lighting
painted curb with alternating yellow and blue stripes separating sidewalk from street
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath a massive yellow elevated highway. Neon billboards in pink and teal illuminate the right side while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with towering futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: large wet intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and reflective asphalt

events.description: exits the covered sidewalk beneath the highway into the open intersection area
navigates across the wide intersection with yellow zebra crosswalk markings while vehicles pass nearby

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet intersection, moving from the covered sidewalk into the open street area with reflective asphalt

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
rain-covered asphalt creating mirror-like reflections of neon signs and streetlights
cluster of buildings with extensive purple and blue neon signage lining the left side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vast open intersection with heavily reflective wet asphalt mirroring the surrounding neon cityscape. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while a vehicle passes on the left. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the view opens up to show more of the futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with street trees, bus shelters, and commercial storefronts including a pawn shop

events.description: begins following a muscular pedestrian wearing a white tank top who is walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following a muscular man in a white tank top along the sidewalk, passing various storefronts and street furniture

notable_agents.action: muscular man in white tank top and dark pants walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green illuminated sign reading 'PAWNSHOP' above a storefront entrance
covered bus stop shelter with glass panels and a bench
single tree with green foliage planted in the sidewalk
small food vendor cart with illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a muscular pedestrian in a white tank top along a commercial sidewalk lined with a pawn shop, bus shelters, and street trees. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon signs as the character moves past various storefronts and urban street furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass walkway deck overlooking lower city levels with transparent flooring

events.description: steps onto a transparent glass overlook deck revealing the lower city streets and shops visible beneath the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking onto a glass overlook deck and looking down through the transparent floor at the lower city levels below

entered.detail: transparent glass walkway with metal railings allowing view of the lower city levels beneath
streets and alleys visible through the transparent glass floor several stories below
colorful neon signs and advertisements visible on the buildings below the glass deck

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a striking glass overlook deck with transparent flooring that reveals the lower city levels beneath. The camera moves across this elevated walkway, looking down at the neon-lit streets and shops visible through the glass. The surrounding architecture features glowing advertisements and reflective surfaces creating a layered vertical cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from the shadow of an elevated highway to a high-altitude glass overlook. It begins with a walk along a wet sidewalk beneath a massive yellow highway structure, where pink and teal neon billboards cast vibrant reflections across the pavement. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a vast intersection with reflective asphalt and yellow-striped crosswalks, allowing the highway to recede as the futuristic skyline expands in view. The perspective then shifts to follow a muscular pedestrian in a white tank top past a commercial strip of pawn shops and bus shelters before finally ascending to a glass overlook deck. This elevated walkway reveals a layered vertical cityscape, with the camera gliding over transparent flooring that looks down upon the neon-lit streets and shops below.
